```{r}
# ====================================================
# WITHIN-SAMPLE BRAY-CURTIS ANALYSIS
# GUARANTEED PAIRWISE BRACKETS
# ====================================================

library(phyloseq)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggsignif)   # reliable brackets

ps <- readRDS('./RSF_all_physeq_wgs_COUNTS_v3.rds')
ps@sam_data$Batch <- as.factor(ps@sam_data$Batch)

bad_batch_samples <- c("B-030-2","B-027-2", "B-024-2", "B-024-1")
if (length(bad_batch_samples) > 0) {
  ps <- prune_samples(!(sample_names(ps) %in% bad_batch_samples), ps)
  cat("Removed", length(bad_batch_samples), "samples\n")
}

det <- 10/100; prev <- 10/100; level <- 'Species'
taxas <- core_members(ps, detection = det, prevalence = prev, include.lowest = FALSE)
ps <- prune_taxa(taxas, ps)
ps <- speedyseq::tax_glom(ps, taxrank = level, NArm = TRUE)

# Add Strata
sam <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sam$SampleID <- rownames(sam)
sam$Strata <- NA_character_
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "A"] <- "AB"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "C"] <- "NO"
sam$Strata[sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "Yes" & is.na(sam$Strata)] <- "PPI"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "B" & is.na(sam$Strata) & sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "No"] <- "OTH"
sam$Strata <- factor(sam$Strata, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))
sample_data(ps)$Strata <- sam$Strata
ps_obj <- ps

# Manual Bray-Curtis
calculate_bray_curtis_manual <- function(vec1, vec2) {
  numerator <- sum(abs(vec1 - vec2), na.rm = TRUE)
  denominator <- sum(vec1 + vec2, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (denominator == 0) return(NA)
  return(numerator / denominator)
}

# Calculate distances
calculate_within_sample_bray_curtis_simple <- function(ps_obj) {
  cat("=== Calculating Within-Sample Bray-Curtis Distances ===\n")
  otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_table(ps_obj))
  meta_df <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps_obj))
  patient_map <- data.frame(
    SampleID = rownames(meta_df),
    PatientID = meta_df$No_Patient,
    Timepoint = meta_df$Timepoint,
    Strata = meta_df$Strata,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  patients_both <- patient_map %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    summarise(
      has_both = all(c("-1", "-2") %in% Timepoint),
      Strata = first(Strata)
    ) %>%
    filter(has_both)
  cat("Found", nrow(patients_both), "patients with both timepoints\n")
  if (nrow(patients_both) == 0) return(data.frame())
  results <- data.frame()
  for (i in 1:nrow(patients_both)) {
    patient <- patients_both$PatientID[i]
    strata  <- patients_both$Strata[i]
    patient_samples <- subset(patient_map, PatientID == patient)
    sample_t1 <- patient_samples$SampleID[patient_samples$Timepoint == "-1"]
    sample_t2 <- patient_samples$SampleID[patient_samples$Timepoint == "-2"]
    if (length(sample_t1) == 1 && length(sample_t2) == 1) {
      vec1 <- as.numeric(otu_mat[, sample_t1])
      vec2 <- as.numeric(otu_mat[, sample_t2])
      vec1[is.na(vec1)] <- 0; vec2[is.na(vec2)] <- 0
      bc_dist <- calculate_bray_curtis_manual(vec1, vec2)
      if (!is.na(bc_dist)) {
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          PatientID = patient,
          Strata = strata,
          BrayCurtis_Distance = bc_dist,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
        cat("  ✓ Patient", patient, "distance:", round(bc_dist, 4), "\n")
      }
    }
  }
  cat("\nSuccessfully calculated distances for", nrow(results), "patients\n")
  return(results)
}

plot_bray_curtis_with_brackets <- function(distance_df, output_dir,
                                           group_col = "Strata",
                                           color_palette = NULL,
                                           p_adjust_method = "bonferroni",
                                           show_p_values = FALSE,
                                           y_max = 1.6,          # increased
                                           plot_title = NULL) {
  
  distance_df <- distance_df %>% filter(!is.na(!!sym(group_col)))
  distance_df[[group_col]] <- droplevels(factor(distance_df[[group_col]]))
  
  if (nrow(distance_df) == 0) {
    cat("No data to plot.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("\nNumber of patients per strata:\n")
  print(table(distance_df[[group_col]]))
  
  if (is.null(color_palette)) {
    color_palette <- c("AB" = "#E41A1C", "PPI" = "#377EB8", 
                       "OTH" = "#4DAF4A", "NO" = "#984EA3")
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(distance_df, aes(x = !!sym(group_col), y = BrayCurtis_Distance, fill = !!sym(group_col))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.6, color = "black", height = 0) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    labs(
      title = plot_title %||% "Within-Sample Bray-Curtis Distances",
      x="Group",
      y = "Bray-Curtis Distance"
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_max))
  
  groups <- levels(distance_df[[group_col]])
  if (length(groups) < 2) {
    cat("Only one group – no comparisons.\n")
    ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot.png"), p, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
    return(p)
  }
  
  comp_list <- combn(groups, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  valid_comps <- list()
  p_values <- c()
  
  for (comp in comp_list) {
    g1 <- comp[1]; g2 <- comp[2]
    data1 <- distance_df$BrayCurtis_Distance[distance_df[[group_col]] == g1]
    data2 <- distance_df$BrayCurtis_Distance[distance_df[[group_col]] == g2]
    if (length(data1) >= 2 && length(data2) >= 2) {
      test <- wilcox.test(data1, data2, exact = FALSE)
      p_values <- c(p_values, test$p.value)
      valid_comps <- c(valid_comps, list(c(g1, g2)))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping", g1, "vs", g2, "– insufficient observations.\n")
    }
  }
  
  if (length(valid_comps) == 0) {
    cat("No valid pairwise comparisons.\n")
    ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot.png"), p, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
    return(p)
  }
  
  if (p_adjust_method != "none") {
    p_values <- p.adjust(p_values, method = p_adjust_method)
  }
  
  if (!show_p_values) {
    annotations <- ifelse(p_values < 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(p_values < 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(p_values < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  } else {
    annotations <- paste0("p = ", format(p_values, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE))
  }
  
  # ---- RAISE BRACKETS AND MOVE TEXT UP ----
  max_val <- max(distance_df$BrayCurtis_Distance, na.rm = TRUE)
  # Use higher y positions (closer to y_max)
  y_positions <- seq(max_val * 1.1, y_max * 0.98, length.out = length(valid_comps))
  
  p <- p + geom_signif(
    comparisons = valid_comps,
    annotations = annotations,
    y_position = y_positions,
    tip_length = 0.02,
    size = 0.8,
    textsize = 5,
    vjust = -0.3          # <-- moves text UP (negative = up)
  )
  
  caption_text <- paste0("Wilcoxon test")
  if (p_adjust_method != "none") {
    caption_text <- paste0(caption_text, " (adjusted: ", p_adjust_method, ")")
  }
  p <- p + labs(caption = caption_text)
  
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "within_sample_bray_curtis.png")
  ggsave(plot_file, p, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  cat("Plot saved to:", plot_file, "\n")
  
  return(p)
}
# ============================================================
# MAIN WRAPPER
# ============================================================
analyze_within_sample_similarity <- function(ps_obj, output_dir,
                                             show_p_values = FALSE,
                                             p_adjust_method = "bonferroni") {
  cat("=== WITHIN-SAMPLE SIMILARITY ANALYSIS ===\n")
  
  ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps_obj, function(x) x / sum(x))
  distances <- calculate_within_sample_bray_curtis_simple(ps_rel)
  
  if (nrow(distances) == 0) {
    cat("No distances calculated.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Remove NA Strata
  distances <- distances %>% filter(!is.na(Strata))
  distances$Strata <- droplevels(distances$Strata)
  cat("After removing NA Strata:", nrow(distances), "patients remain.\n")
  
  # Colours
  strata_colors <- c(AB = "#E41A1C", PPI = "#377EB8", OTH = "#4DAF4A", NO = "#984EA3")
  
 p <- plot_bray_curtis_with_brackets(
  distance_df = distances,
  output_dir = output_dir,
  group_col = "Strata",
  color_palette = strata_colors,
  p_adjust_method = p_adjust_method,
  show_p_values = show_p_values,
  y_max =2.10,   # <-- added
  plot_title = "Within-Sample Bray-Curtis Distances between Timepoints"
)
  
  # Save statistics (optional – you can add back the summary if needed)
  cat("\n=== COMPLETE ===\n")
  return(list(distances = distances, plot = p))
}

# ============================================================
# RUN
# ============================================================
results <- analyze_within_sample_similarity(
  ps_obj = ps_obj,
  output_dir = "/bray_curtis",
  show_p_values = FALSE,
  p_adjust_method = "none"
)
```
